---
title: "edda.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\sentinel\wardens\edda.py"
loc: 49
complexity: 11
logic_score: 6.38
style_score: 3.92
intel_score: 3.03
overall_score: 2.72
---

## Intent
The `edda.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on EddaWarden, scan. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via EddaWarden, scan. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [ast](file://ast)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.base](file://src.sentinel.wardens.base)

### Exports
- `EddaWarden`
- `scan`
